moduleDescription: This module implements a json parser. It is used and exported by the json standard library module, but can also be used in its own right.

entries.name: JsonEventKind
entries.code:
JsonEventKind = enum
  jsonError,                ## an error occurred during parsing
  jsonEof,                  ## end of file reached
  jsonString,               ## a string literal
  jsonInt,                  ## an integer literal
  jsonFloat,                ## a float literal
  jsonTrue,                 ## the value `true`
  jsonFalse,                ## the value `false`
  jsonNull,                 ## the value `null`
  jsonObjectStart,          ## start of an object: the `{` token
  jsonObjectEnd,            ## end of an object: the `}` token
  jsonArrayStart,           ## start of an array: the `[` token
  jsonArrayEnd               ## end of an array: the `]` token
entries.description: enumeration of all events that may occur when parsing

entries.name: TokKind
entries.code:
TokKind = enum
  tkError, tkEof, tkString, tkInt, tkFloat, tkTrue, tkFalse, tkNull, tkCurlyLe,
  tkCurlyRi, tkBracketLe, tkBracketRi, tkColon, tkComma

entries.name: JsonError
entries.code:
JsonError = enum
  errNone,                  ## no error
  errInvalidToken,          ## invalid token
  errStringExpected,        ## string expected
  errColonExpected,         ## `:` expected
  errCommaExpected,         ## `,` expected
  errBracketRiExpected,     ## `]` expected
  errCurlyRiExpected,       ## `}` expected
  errQuoteExpected,         ## `"` or `'` expected
  errEOC_Expected,          ## `*/` expected
  errEofExpected,           ## EOF expected
  errExprExpected            ## expr expected
entries.description: enumeration that lists all errors that can occur

entries.name: JsonParser
entries.code:
JsonParser = object of BaseLexer
  a*: string
  tok*: TokKind

entries.name: JsonKindError
entries.code: JsonKindError = object of ValueError
entries.description: raised by the to macro if the JSON kind is incorrect.

entries.name: JsonParsingError
entries.code: JsonParsingError = object of ValueError
entries.description: is raised for a JSON error

entries.name: errorMessages
entries.code:
errorMessages: array[JsonError, string] = ["no error", "invalid token",
    "string expected", "\':\' expected", "\',\' expected", "\']\' expected",
    "\'}\' expected", "\'\"\' or \"\'\" expected", "\'*/\' expected",
    "EOF expected", "expression expected"]

entries.name: open
entries.description: initializes the parser with an input stream. Filename is only used for nice error messages. If rawStringLiterals is true, string literals are kept with their surrounding quotes and escape sequences in them are left untouched too.

entries.name: close
entries.code:
proc close(my: var JsonParser) {.inline, raises: [IOError, OSError],
                                 tags: [WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}
entries.description: closes the parser my and its associated input stream.

entries.name: str
entries.code: proc str(my: JsonParser): string {.inline, raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: returns the character data for the events: jsonInt, jsonFloat, jsonString

entries.name: getInt
entries.code:
proc getInt(my: JsonParser): BiggestInt {.inline, raises: [ValueError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: returns the number for the event: jsonInt

entries.name: getFloat
entries.code:
proc getFloat(my: JsonParser): float {.inline, raises: [ValueError], tags: [],
                                       forbids: [].}
entries.description: returns the number for the event: jsonFloat

entries.name: kind
entries.code:
proc kind(my: JsonParser): JsonEventKind {.inline, raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
entries.description: returns the current event type for the JSON parser

entries.name: getColumn
entries.code: proc getColumn(my: JsonParser): int {.inline, raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: get the current column the parser has arrived at.

entries.name: getLine
entries.code: proc getLine(my: JsonParser): int {.inline, raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: get the current line the parser has arrived at.

entries.name: getFilename
entries.code:
proc getFilename(my: JsonParser): string {.inline, raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
entries.description: get the filename of the file that the parser processes.

entries.name: errorMsg
entries.code:
proc errorMsg(my: JsonParser): string {.raises: [ValueError], tags: [],
                                        forbids: [].}
entries.description: returns a helpful error message for the event jsonError

entries.name: errorMsgExpected
entries.code:
proc errorMsgExpected(my: JsonParser; e: string): string {.raises: [ValueError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: returns an error message "e expected" in the same format as the other error messages

entries.name: parseEscapedUTF16
entries.code:
proc parseEscapedUTF16(buf: cstring; pos: var int): int {.raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}

entries.name: getTok
entries.code:
proc getTok(my: var JsonParser): TokKind {.raises: [IOError, OSError],
    tags: [ReadIOEffect], forbids: [].}

entries.name: next
entries.code:
proc next(my: var JsonParser) {.raises: [IOError, OSError],
                                tags: [ReadIOEffect], forbids: [].}
entries.description: retrieves the first/next event. This controls the parser.

entries.name: raiseParseErr
entries.code:
proc raiseParseErr(p: JsonParser; msg: string) {.noinline, noreturn,
    raises: [JsonParsingError, ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: raises an EJsonParsingError exception.

entries.name: eat
